german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not a Major Barrier
german_requirement.subtitle: Most roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility despite some unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical PMs Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A narrow gap indicates a competitive landscape for product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: More than half of the workforce consists of senior-level positions.

work_mode.title: Work Mode Preferences Lean Towards On-Site Engagement
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees favor on-site work, with remote options remaining limited.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: A significant portion of roles now prioritize AI responsibilities and skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
